ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Name of the student */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the student enrolled */,
  "graduation_date" TEXT /* Expected graduation date */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Student's date of birth */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Student's gender */,
  "email" TEXT /* Student's email address */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Student's phone number */,
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* Parent ID for the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "subject_name" TEXT /* Name of the subject */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the subject */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits for the subject */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score entry */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Original score recorded */,
  "new_score" INTEGER /* Updated score after revision */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the score was recorded */,
  "score_type" TEXT /* Type of score (e.g., quiz, assignment, exam) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "score_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score change */,
  "score_id" INTEGER /* ID of the score entry being changed */,
  "previous_score" INTEGER /* Previous score before the change */,
  "new_score" INTEGER /* New score after the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* Person who made the change */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_score_changes_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES educators ("educator_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_score_changes_score_id FOREIGN KEY ("score_id") REFERENCES scores ("score_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "educators" (
  "educator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each educator */,
  "educator_name" TEXT /* Name of the educator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the educator */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the educator belongs to */,
  "designation" TEXT /* Designation of the educator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("educator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance report */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student the report is for */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the performance report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., midterm, final) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reports_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subject_enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the student enrolled in the subject */,
  "grade_level" INTEGER /* Grade level of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subject_enrollments_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subject_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject */,
  "attendance_date" TEXT /* Date of the attendance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the attendance (e.g., Present, Absent) */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the attendance status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject the assignment belongs to */,
  "assignment_name" TEXT /* Name of the assignment */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the assignment */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score obtained for the assignment */,
  "weightage" TEXT /* Weightage of the assignment in the final grade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignments_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assignment_submissions" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission */,
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assignment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who submitted */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date when the submission was made */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score obtained for the submission */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided by the educator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignment_submissions_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignment_submissions_assignment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignment_id") REFERENCES assignments ("assignment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of feedback */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student receiving the feedback */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject the feedback is for */,
  "feedback_content" TEXT /* Content of the feedback */,
  "date_given" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was given */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., verbal, written) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_feedback_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_feedback_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_goals" (
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each goal */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who set the goal */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject the goal is for */,
  "goal_description" TEXT /* Description of the goal */,
  "target_score" INTEGER /* Target score the student aims to achieve */,
  "target_date" TEXT /* Target date to achieve the goal */,
  "progress" TEXT /* Progress made towards the goal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_goals_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_goals_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_support" (
  "support_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each support service */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student receiving support */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject the support is for */,
  "support_type" TEXT /* Type of support offered (e.g., tutoring, mentoring) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the support */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the support */,
  "provider" TEXT /* Provider of the support service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("support_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_support_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_support_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parent_contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parent contact */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "parent_name" TEXT /* Name of the parent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the parent */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the parent */,
  "relation" TEXT /* Relation of the parent to the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parent_contacts_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the role */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the role */,
  "responsibilities" TEXT /* Responsibilities associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_roles_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)
